notes: Video complete: videos/PostSnag/renders/video.mp4 (49.3s, standard quality -- two backgrounded --quality high render attempts were externally killed mid-run at 47%/56%, unrelated to this project's files, so fell back to a foreground --quality standard render per CLAUDE.md's own default guidance absent an explicit 'ship as final' instruction; it completed clean in 2m31.9s / 154.6s per render_time.json). Fixed several real bugs found via QC: a CSS comment containing literal '<video>' text broke assemble-index's video scanner; all 7 frame roots were missing contract-required data-start/data-duration; assemble-index.mjs's video-hoisting is destructive/non-idempotent (had to restore frame 3/4's video tags twice); frame 5's full-bleed background video always painted above its own foreground content (approved videos mount at a very high host track index) causing a real contrast failure -- dropped that video, card grid stands fine alone. Captions skipped (no Whisper available in this environment). Final check: 0 errors across lint/runtime/layout/motion, 11/11 contrast. QC frames from the final render inspected and look correct (hook type, real PostSnag dashboard footage in frames 3/4, clean card grid in frame 5, CTA button legible). MusicGen BGM is non-commercial-licensed -- flagged to user before any commercial ship. Ready for node scripts/log-usage.mjs PostSnag.
